lines.speaker: Squire (Intermediate)
lines.text: Hi, how can I help you?

lines.speaker: Squire (Intermediate)
lines.text: I'm a Squire for the Void Knights.

lines.speaker: Squire (Intermediate)
lines.text: The Void Knights, they are great warriors of balance who do Guthix's work here in Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Squire (Intermediate)
lines.text: Entry is strictly invite only, however we do need help continuing Guthix's work.

lines.speaker: Squire (Intermediate)
lines.text: Ah well you see we try to keep Gielinor as Guthix intended, it's very challenging. Actually we've been having some problems recently, maybe you could help us?

lines.speaker: Squire (Intermediate)
lines.text: Well the order has become quite diminished over the years, it's a very long process to learn the skills of a Void Knight. Recently there have been breaches into our realm from somewhere else, and strange creatures

lines.speaker: Squire (Intermediate)
lines.text: have been pouring through. We can't let that happen, and we'd be very grateful if you'd help us.

lines.speaker: Squire (Intermediate)
lines.text: We send launchers from our outpost to the nearby islands. If you go and wait in the lander there that'd really help.

lines.speaker: Squire (Intermediate)
lines.text: It is the name that Guthix gave to this world, so we honour him with its use.

lines.speaker: Squire (Intermediate)
lines.text: This is where we launch our landers to combat the invasion of the nearby islands. You'll see three landers - one for novice, intermediate and veteran adventurers. Each has a different difficulty, but they therefore offer

lines.speaker: Squire (Intermediate)
lines.text: Simple. We send a lander out every few minutes, however we need at least 5 volunteers or it's a suicide mission. The lander can only hold a maximum of 25 people though, so we do send them out early if they get

lines.speaker: Squire (Intermediate)
lines.text: full. If you'd be willing to help us then just wait in the lander and we'll launch it as soon as it's ready. However you will need a combat level of 70 to use this lander.

sections.title: When there are not enough players in the lander

lines.speaker: Squire (Intermediate)
lines.text: Come on, we need more recruits!

sections.title: When there are enough players in the lander
